author: Mark Frost
text: 2026-07-17 CI repair on feat/t1000e (PR #2) — most of it fixed and pushed (commits through 8e62c183). GREEN now: Python 3.11/3.12 (pytest-cov was undeclared), Rust clippy+fmt (useless writeln borrow), Wire Format Roundtrip (generator imported nonexistent APIs), C static analysis clang-tidy (all 23 findings cleared — verified locally with clang-tidy), cppcheck, all hardware-target builds, multi-node sim, interop, property-based. 15/18 non-skipped checks pass. Also fixed a real cross-language KISS wire bug found by hypothesis (command byte colliding with FEND/FESC was unescaped). THREE failures remain, all PRE-EXISTING and unrelated to the agent-fleet code merge, and all UN-VALIDATABLE in this sandbox (no gcc-multilib for 32-bit native_sim, no sudo, no Renode): filed as separate beads. See child beads for details.
